mapper.select: select id, user_id, expire_email_notice, renew_fail_email_notice, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status from user_config where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into user_config(id,user_id, expire_email_notice, renew_fail_email_notice, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{expireEmailNotice}, #{renewFailEmailNotice}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{status})

insert into user_config(id,user_id, expire_email_notice, renew_fail_email_notice, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.expireEmailNotice}, #{entity.renewFailEmailNotice}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into user_config(id,user_id, expire_email_notice, renew_fail_email_notice, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time, status) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.expireEmailNotice}, #{entity.renewFailEmailNotice}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), expire_email_notice = values(expire_email_notice), renew_fail_email_notice = values(renew_fail_email_notice), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), status = values(status)
